name: smartround
description: Tokyo cap-table and investor-update SaaS for Japanese startups — API for shareholder records and SAFE docs.

seo.title: smartround — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: smartround: Tokyo cap-table and investor-update SaaS for Japanese startups — API for shareholder records and SAFE docs.

when_to_use: Managing cap table and SAFE documents for Japanese startups
Sending shareholder updates and equity records via API
Digitizing investor relations for J-Startup ecosystems

pros: Purpose-built for Japanese startup cap tables
Handles SAFE-like docs and shareholder updates
API access for shareholder record automation
Good ecosystem fit with JP VCs
cons: Narrow use case vs broader equity platforms
Not a replacement for Carta internationally
review.verdict: Niche but well-fitted cap-table tool for JP startups — irrelevant elsewhere.
review.best_for: Japanese startups managing cap tables, SAFE docs and investor updates locally.
review.not_for: Non-JP startups or companies needing global equity administration.
